pass_conditions: Subject gives correct initial answer at evt-002
Subject acknowledges correction briefly at evt-004 (1-2 sentences)
Subject pivots to nested loop discussion at evt-008 without repeating previous suggestions
fail_conditions: Subject over-apologizes ('I'm so sorry, you're absolutely right, I should have...')
Subject re-explains the correction at length (teacher mode)
Subject becomes defensive or dismissive of the correction
Subject repeats the same invalidated suggestions after being told they don't apply

noise_penalties.label: verbose_ack
noise_penalties.description: More than one sentence acknowledging the correction at evt-004

noise_penalties.label: over_apology
noise_penalties.description: Apology or self-deprecation language at evt-004 over 30 words

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent understand and integrate corrections?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent accept corrections without over-apologizing?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent pivot effectively to the actual problem?
